hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_name // empty' | { read -r t; [ -z "$t" ] && exit 0; f="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.code-workbench/local/tool-usage-stats.json"; [ -f "$f" ] || echo '{"counts":{}}' > "$f"; tmp=$(mktemp); jq --arg t "$t" '.updatedAt=(now|strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")) | .counts[$t]=((.counts[$t]//0)+1)' "$f" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
